// token-policy.rules.json
var token_policy_rules_default = [
  {
    resource: "https://api.github.com/repos/example/repo"
  }
];

// ../entrypoints/json-index.ts
var json_index_default = {
  fetch() {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      constructor: token_policy_rules_default.constructor.name,
      rules: token_policy_rules_default,
      type: typeof token_policy_rules_default
    }));
  }
};
export {
  json_index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=json-index.js.map
